magic_system.gap: The climax (Ch 22-23) introduces two mechanics not established in the hard rules: (1) Cảnh's plan to 'pour' his memories into emptied minds, and (2) Linh's 'partial Rửa' that takes only a fragment rather than a full year. Rule 3 states 'thay đổi luôn là chuyển giới hoàn toàn' and Rule 4 specifies exactly 'một năm dương lịch tròn.' A writer would have to retroactively justify or rewrite the ending to match established rules.
magic_system.fix: Either (a) revise the climax to work within existing rules—perhaps Cảnh's memory-insertion plan is his delusion that Linh must debunk, not a real mechanic—or (b) foreshadow these exceptions earlier: have a character discover historical records of 'incomplete' Rửa, or show the rules bending when the caller stops mid-call. The partial Rửa needs at minimum one prior hint that interruption is possible.
magic_system.note: The system otherwise excels: costs drive all plot (memory loss forces relationship dilemmas), societal implications are specific and numerous (administrative nightmare, love as finite resource, rain-avoidance economy), and testability is high. The problem is confined to the final act.

world_history.gap: History consists of three points (Thời Sơ Khởi, Lần Gãy Đầu Tiên, 1994 formation) with no causal chain between them. The Thời Sơ Khởi myth is atmospheric but generates no present-day faction conflict or character motivation. We don't know why the break happened, why 1994, or why these six students.
world_history.fix: Add one concrete historical event between Lần Gãy and 1994 that created present tensions—perhaps a previous Vòng that ended disastrously, or an official attempt to study/control Rửa that Bà Lụa witnessed. This would give the Ủy Ban's secrecy historical motivation and link the 1994 event to a pattern rather than pure randomness.
world_history.note: The decorative myth is beautiful but plot-irrelevant. The history that matters (1994 formation, Cảnh's erasure) is well-documented; what's missing is the connective tissue that makes it feel inevitable rather than arbitrary.

geography_and_culture.gap: The sensory signatures are vivid and distinct, but the economic/class tensions implied by the world bible (rain-avoidance services cost money, administrative barriers for the Rửa'd) are underexploited in the outline. Class could drive additional conflict but remains background.
geography_and_culture.fix: Give one character a concrete economic stake tied to their location—perhaps Linh's workshop is in a flood-prone area where rent is cheap but rain exposure is high, forcing a choice between poverty and safety. This would make geography generate plot, not just atmosphere.
geography_and_culture.note: Exceptional work. Huế is not a painted backdrop but a living system where geography (Hương Thủy's floods, Bạch Mã's rain barrier, sông Hương's memory-saturated water) directly enables or constrains character action. Food customs (bún bò cay before rain) and superstitions (black umbrellas, naming taboo) generate real plot tension.

lore_interconnection.gap: Removing the magic system collapses the political structure (Ủy Ban's secret files become pointless) and the class system (rain-avoidance economy vanishes), confirming strong interconnection. However, the connection between geography and politics is one-directional: politics affects geography minimally. The Ủy Ban doesn't shape Huế's physical space.
lore_interconnection.fix: Add one way the political response to Rửa has physically altered Huế—perhaps certain neighborhoods are 'registered Rửa zones' with different building codes, or the road to Hương Thủy is deliberately unmaintained to discourage the rain-callers. This closes the feedback loop.
lore_interconnection.note: The core triangle (magic → memory loss → love as finite resource → control vs. freedom) is tight. Every element feeds the thematic question. The interconnection is genuinely impressive.

iceberg_depth.gap: The phrase 'Không ai biết' appears as explanation for three major mysteries (why the break, why this group, why Hằng is immune). Some of these read as genuine depth (the reader shouldn't know yet); others read as the author not having decided. The outline reveals Cảnh's full plan, so the author clearly knows *that* answer—but the underlying 'why this six?' remains genuinely handwaved.
iceberg_depth.fix: Decide internally (not necessarily on-page) why these six and not others. Document it in the canon even if it's never stated in the novel. The author needs to know; the reader doesn't. A one-line note ('common factor: all six were within 50m of the river at the moment of a once-in-12-years atmospheric convergence') would suffice.
iceberg_depth.note: The implied depth is otherwise strong: the sound-in-rain phenomenon, mirror lag, memory-scent connection, and Hoa hậu lan's blooming all suggest a world deeper than what's explained. The problem is concentrated in origin questions.

character_depth.gap: Duy's wound/want/need/lie chain is abbreviated to the point of stubbiness. His 'lạc cảm' (emotional numbness) is compelling but sketched. For a character whose acceptance contrasts Khánh's rage, Duy needs a causal chain as strong as the others. His lie ('Rửa is normal') should logically follow from a wound, but what wound? The numbness IS the wound.
character_depth.fix: Give Duy a concrete pre-1994 experience that pre-disposed him to emotional shutdown—perhaps a parent who coped with trauma through denial, teaching Duy that acceptance equals survival. His lie should be 'numbness is peace' and his need should be 'feeling pain is proof you're alive.' One paragraph would fix this.
character_depth.note: Linh, Tuấn, Cảnh, and Hằng have exemplary chains. Linh's lie ('love needs memory to be real') follows causally from her wound (knowing she loved but not feeling it). Cảnh's lie ('control is love') follows from his wound (being forgotten by everyone he loved). The causal logic is strong.

character_distinctiveness.gap: Khánh and Cảnh share a metaphor domain (pressure/flow) that could cause voice confusion in dialogue-heavy scenes. Khánh speaks in 'short, hammering' sentences; Cảnh speaks in 'technical but gentle' sentences about water systems. When both discuss rain, differentiation relies solely on content rather than syntax.
character_distinctiveness.fix: Shift Khánh's metaphor domain away from water entirely—perhaps to metal/tools ('đập', 'mài', 'rỉ' in the sense of rust, not leakage). Khánh thinks in terms of breaking and fixing; Cảnh thinks in terms of channeling and containing. This would eliminate overlap.
character_distinctiveness.note: Otherwise excellent. Removing dialogue tags, Linh's half-finished sentences and Hằng's date-stamped specificity are immediately identifiable. Tuấn's nostalgic preambles ('Hồi đó mình...') and Duy's deflection-through-humor are distinct. The voice profiles are actionable.

character_secrets.gap: Cô Bích's secret (the flagged file on Cảnh) is specific and plot-driving, but it pays off only in background—she never acts on it in the outline. Her investigation thread (thread 17) resolves with 'not the enemy' rather than with Bích confronting Cảnh or the group. Her secret doesn't change trajectory; it creates a red herring that disperses.
character_secrets.fix: Give Bích one scene where her knowledge forces a choice—perhaps Khánh comes to her for help in Ch 20 and Bích must decide whether to share the flagged file, knowing it will expose Cảnh. This would convert her passive knowledge into active secret-keeping with consequences.
character_secrets.note: Linh's secret (trying to stop loving Tuấn) directly opposes Tuấn's arc and would devastate him if revealed. Tuấn's shifting affection would reframe the Linh-Tuấn-Hằng triangle. Hằng's love for Linh motivates her fear of Rửa. Cảnh's surveillance explains the mưa pattern. These are strong.

outline_completeness.gap: The climax's emotional logic is clear but the physical staging is thin. Ch 22-23 describe a conversation in Cảnh's house, but the outline doesn't specify how Linh physically stops the rain-call or what Cảnh must *do* to cease. Does Cảnh speak a word? Release Cảnh's hand? The action blocking is missing.
outline_completeness.fix: Add 1-2 sentences to Ch 23 specifying the physical mechanism of cessation: 'Cảnh opens his palm—the gesture he uses to pull rain—and Linh presses her hand flat over his, closing it. The rain slows.' This gives the director (or writer) concrete blocking.
outline_completeness.note: Otherwise exceptionally complete. Every chapter has POV, location, Save the Cat beat, emotional arc, try-fail cycle, and plant/harvest notes. The MICE quotient is correct (Milieu→Inquiry→Event→Character opening, reversed closing). Act breaks hit target percentages.

foreshadowing_balance.gap: Thread 39 (Linh's partial Rửa) is planted and harvested within Ch 23—it never appears before that chapter. Per the ledger, it has a plant-to-payoff distance of 0 chapters. For a climactic magical event, this is the weakest thread in the system.
foreshadowing_balance.fix: Foreshadow partial Rửa by at least 3 chapters. Perhaps in Ch 14, Bà Lụa mentions an old legend about rain 'dying mid-fall' when the caller loses conviction. Or in Ch 17, when Tuấn is Rửa'd, Linh notices the change seemed to 'stutter' for a moment—passed off as her imagination, later revealed as significant.
foreshadowing_balance.note: The tracking system is exemplary: 40 threads with type classification, plant/cement/harvest chapters, and a statistical breakdown. 80% have ≥3 chapter distance. The thread types are diverse (sensory, object, action, dialogue, world-rule, relationship, structural). This is professional-level continuity management.

internal_consistency.gap: Three significant contradictions: (1) Partial Rửa in Ch 23 violates Rule 3 ('thay đổi luôn là chuyển giới hoàn toàn') and Rule 4 ('một năm dương lịch tròn'). (2) Memory-insertion mechanic (Ch 22) is absent from the world bible's hard rules—if Rửa can *fill* as well as *empty*, this fundamentally changes the system. (3) Hằng's non-Rửa status after 6 years contradicts the statement that 'trung bình, trong một năm, cả năm người đều bị Rửa ít nhất một lần.'
internal_consistency.fix: For (1) and (2): Establish in the world bible that these are *theoretical* limits that can be exceeded under specific conditions, and foreshadow those conditions. For (3): Either add an explicit exception to the rule ('if a member has no deep romantic attachment, Rửa may skip them') or acknowledge it as a mystery the characters discuss.
internal_consistency.note: These are not minor continuity errors—they affect the climax and the core premise. A writer would need to resolve them before drafting the final act. The documents are otherwise meticulous about dates, ages, and event sequences.

voice_clarity.gap: The voice document's anti-patterns ('Không giải thích hệ thống phép thuật bằng ngôn ngữ khoa học,' 'Không dùng thuật ngữ y khoa') are strong, but one exemplar line borders on the explicit emotional naming it claims to avoid: 'Chắc hồi đó có gì quan trọng lắm.' The 'quan trọng' is abstract rather than physical. Minor.
voice_clarity.fix: Replace with a more body-first version: 'Chắc hồi đó có gì làm mình nghẹn. Chỗ này—' chạm ngực '—nó còn nặng.' This removes the abstract 'quan trọng' and replaces it with the physical 'nặng' sensation already established.
voice_clarity.note: The voice definition is among the strongest elements. The exemplar passage is genuinely literary Vietnamese with varied rhythm, sensory grounding, and emotional restraint. The metaphor wells (water/rain, incense/karma, erosion) are culturally resonant and actionable. The 'body before emotion' rule is clear and enforced.

canon_coverage.gap: The canon does not log the partial Rửa exception (Ch 23) or the memory-insertion mechanic (Ch 22), because these appear only in the outline. If a writer introduced these in drafting, the canon would flag them as contradictions rather than planned reveals.
canon_coverage.fix: Add a 'Confirmed Exceptions' section to the canon: 'Partial Rửa: Possible when rain-call is interrupted mid-activation (Ch 23). Memory insertion: Cảnh's theory, unconfirmed (Ch 22).' This prevents a writer from treating them as errors.
canon_coverage.note: Coverage is otherwise exhaustive: dates, ages, locations, relationship states, faction positions, and cultural customs are all sourced and cross-referenced. The canon document alone would catch most drafting errors.

found: English terms in Vietnamese outline: 'confirmed', 'implied', 'payoff', 'reinforced', 'red herring', 'false defeat' appear in the Vietnamese outline without translation—acceptable for author notes but would need Vietnamese equivalents in any draft-facing document

Occasional formulaic chapter summaries in the outline: several chapters end with 'Nói dối: Challenged mạnh' or 'Nói dối: Reinforced' using the same English verb, creating a repetitive pattern visible in the planning layer

One untranslated English phrase in world bible: 'Rửa không chữa bệnh. Không kéo dài tuổi thọ. Không cho khả năng siêu nhiên' uses the English sentence template 'X does not Y. X does not Z. X does not W.' rather than varied Vietnamese structures
slop_in_planning_docs.note: The creative prose exemplars and dialogue are clean of AI slop. The Vietnamese literary writing is natural, with proper particles, regional markers, and culturally authentic metaphor. Issues are confined to the meta-planning layer where the author mixes English analytical terms into Vietnamese framework text.

contradictions_found: Partial Rửa (Ch 23) vs. Rule 3 ('thay đổi luôn là chuyển giới hoàn toàn') and Rule 4 ('một năm dương lịch tròn')—Linh's change is incomplete and takes only a fragment of memory, not a full year
Memory-insertion mechanic (Ch 22, Cảnh's plan to fill emptied minds) absent from world bible's hard rules—introduced only at climax without prior establishment
Hằng's non-Rửa status after 6 years vs. world bible statement 'trung bình, trong một năm, cả năm người đều bị Rửa ít nhất một lần'—acknowledged as mystery but not reconciled with the stated rule

Minor: Tuấn's Rửa count in world bible says 'hai lần Rửa sau chỉ lấy năm 1995 và 1997' but characters.md says his last Rửa took memories of Hằng, not Linh—implies a fourth Rửa not accounted for in the 'three times' count, or the count needs updating
top_3_improvements: Resolve the climax contradictions: Either foreshadow partial Rửa and memory insertion as rare exceptions (add to world bible with conditions), or revise Ch 22-23 to work within established hard rules. This is the single highest-leverage fix because it affects the ending and forces no other changes.

Deepen Duy's wound/want/need/lie chain to match the other characters. Currently he's a thematic counterweight without causal depth. One paragraph linking his emotional numbness to a pre-1994 experience would bring him to parity.

Add one causal historical event between Lần Gãy and 1994 that explains why the Ủy Ban fears Vòngs and why Bà Lụa tracks them. This would transform decorative history into plot-driving tension and give the political faction clearer motivation.
